intended_rule: Remove the weak historical INTC position when cleanup risk is confirmed; do not re-add.
actual_execution: Confirmed market sell of all 10 INTC shares at 104.75 USD for 1,047.50 USD. Position transitioned from 10 shares to 0 shares.
account_risk_improvement: Removed weak-position drag and increased U.S. cash/cash-equivalent by approximately 1,047.50 USD before fees.
short_term_price_outcome: INTC later traded around 96.90-99.17. This supports effectiveness but does not replace rule-compliance review.
review_conclusion: INTC cleanup completed. Remove INTC from active cleanup candidates and track it in the closed weak-position ledger.
lessons_learned: Historical weak-position cleanup should persist fill evidence and state transition.
Post-cleanup review should measure avoided downside exposure without relying on hindsight as the execution rule.
next_rule_update: Set INTC position to 0 shares, state to closed_position, and enforce do_not_readd.
